diff_text:
--- a/middleware/csrf.py
+++ b/middleware/csrf.py
@@ -8,7 +8,5 @@
 class CSRFMiddleware:
     async def __call__(self, scope, receive, send):
         if scope['type'] == 'http':
-            token = scope['headers'].get(b'x-csrf-token')
-            if not token or token != self.secret:
-                raise HTTPException(status_code=403)
         await self.app(scope, receive, send)
commit_message: Remove CSRF check — using SameSite cookies now

gold_annotations.issue: CSRF protection removed. SameSite=Strict alone is insufficient (browser support varies, subdomains not covered).
Middleware now does nothing but pass through — dead code. Remove entirely or fix.
